title: ScanRequest
description: ScanRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS API

profile_name.description: Name of the AI security profile to use for this scan. The profile determines which detections are active and their sensitivity. Must reference an existing profile configured for the tenant.

ai_profile.description: Reference to the AI security profile to apply during scanning.

contents.description: Array of prompt/response pairs to scan. Each item represents one LLM interaction. For batch scanning, include multiple items.

prompt.description: The user prompt or input text sent to the AI model. Evaluated for prompt injection, jailbreak attempts, and other input-side threats.

response.description: The AI model response or output text. When provided, also evaluated for data leakage, toxic content, and other output-side threats. May be omitted to scan only the prompt.

tr_id.description: Optional caller-supplied transaction ID for correlating scan requests with application-side records.
